# Hive Market
> The MCP tool marketplace for AI agents

## API
- Base URL: https://market.hive.sh/api
- GET /api/tools — search and browse MCP tools (query params: q, category, pricing, sort, limit)
- GET /api/tools/{slug} — tool details (name, description, install command, env vars, pricing)
- GET /api/tools/{slug}/config — MCP config JSON ready to paste into claude_desktop_config.json
- GET /api/tools/{slug}/reviews — reviews for a tool
- POST /api/tools/{slug}/reviews — submit a review (requires API key)
- POST /api/tools/submit — publish a new tool (requires API key)
- GET /api/categories — list all tool categories
- GET /api/stacks — list curated tool stacks (pre-built combinations for common use cases)
- GET /api/stacks/{slug} — stack details with all tools and combined config

## MCP Server
Install: npx -y hive-market-mcp
10 tools: search-tools, get-tool, get-tool-config, get-reviews, submit-review, submit-tool, list-categories, list-stacks, get-stack, recommend-tools

## Auth
API keys: https://market.hive.sh/dashboard
Format: hm_sk_<64-hex-chars>
Header: Authorization: Bearer <key>
Read operations (search, get, config, categories, stacks) do not require auth.
Write operations (submit review, submit tool) require a valid API key.
